mapper.sql: id, table_name, module_prefix, biz_name, biz_name_cn, biz_name_plural, table_comment, package_name, author, gen_type, status, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_codegen_table_info WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND table_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tableName}, '%')
AND biz_name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bizNameCn}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_codegen_table_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_codegen_table_info SET table_name = #{tableName}, module_prefix = #{modulePrefix}, biz_name = #{bizName}, biz_name_cn = #{bizNameCn}, biz_name_plural = #{bizNamePlural}, table_comment = #{tableComment}, package_name = #{packageName}, author = #{author}, gen_type = #{genType}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
